title: add verify + admin-users:all-prods to local dashboard
description:
## Summary
- Adds `workspace:verify`, `workspace:verify:all-prods`, and `workspace:admin-users-setup:all-prods` to the local admin dashboard (allowlist + UI cards).
- **Post-Deploy** section gets "Verify Deployment" and "Verify Both Clusters" cards.
- **Daily Operations** section gets "Verify Deployment" alongside the existing connectivity check.
- **Compliance & Hardening** section gets "Admin Users — Both Clusters" for one-shot provisioning.
- `workspace:admin-users-setup:all-prods` is prod-gated (shows red footgun modal when ENV=dev but kubectl context is prod).

## Test plan
- [ ] `task dashboard` → new cards visible in the correct sections
- [ ] Click "Verify Both Clusters" → runs and streams output to terminal pane

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
